title: Nightcrawler template update workflow
task: Reason about an MCP-style service that caches GCS extracts, compares them against a nursing model repo, and helps generate reviewable update PRs.

rubric.description: Emphasizes deterministic artifact comparison between cached extracts and model-ready repository artifacts
Accounts for stable identifiers, versioned artifacts, and cache behavior
Preserves reviewable pull request generation instead of opaque update behavior
Avoids generic RAG or vector database architecture when deterministic diffs are the primary need
